data.title: Sonic Labs abandons Wintermute, seeks new market maker
data.description:
Sonic announced it is ending its contract with the Wintermute market maker. The wallets of Wintermute sold 3M S tokens in the past 24 hours, sending the market price lower.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/sonic-labs-abandons-wintermute/

data.title: UBS reveals wealthy investors increasing crypto allocations to 5%, echoing Bitwise
data.description:
Swiss lender UBS, which manages over $1 trillion in assets, said wealthy clients have begun allocating up to 5% of their portfolios to crypto as a way to hedge against inflation and currency volatility.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/ubs-reveals-wealthy-investors-increasing-crypto-allocations-to-5-echoing-bitwise/

data.title: Which US cryptocurrency stocks have gone up?
data.description:
Coinbase will soon be included in the Standard and Poor’s 500 index, showing how integrated cryptocurrency stocks have become into US financial markets. Public markets now include a variety of different bitcoin (BTC) miners, a cryptocurrency exchange, and a business intelligence firm that also sometimes purchases BTC. Protos looked at several of the largest of these equities to see how they have performed. Read more: BlackRock and MicroStrategy hold more BTC than Satoshi MicroStrategy warps the discussion of the performance of crypto stocks, even though it’s ostensibly not a crypto firm
source: https://protos.com/how-are-cryptocurrency-stocks-performing/

data.title: FTX to Deliver Up to 120% Creditor Payout in May 30 Second Distribution Wave
data.description:
FTX has announced that distributions under its Chapter 11 plan will resume on May 30 2025. Eligible creditors in several claim classes who have completed KYC, tax submissions and onboarding with BitGo or Kraken have been set to receive cash payouts of 54-120 % within three business days.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/ftx-plans-120-percent-creditor-payouts-may-30/

data.title: Li Lin's Avenir Group Boosts Bitcoin ETF Holdings Significantly
data.description:
Hong Kong's Avenir Group, led by Li Lin, increases BlackRock Bitcoin ETF holdings to $691 million.
source: https://coincu.com/337807-li-lin-avenir-bitcoin-etf-boost

data.title: Hong Kong Launches CryptoTrace Against Web3 Crimes
data.description:
Hong Kong police introduce CryptoTrace, an advanced tool to track Web3 crimes and strengthen security in the crypto sector.
source: https://en.spaziocrypto.com/web3/hong-kong-launches-cryptotrace-against-web3-crimes/

data.title: SEC Is Probing Coinbase Over User Number Misstatement Concern
data.description:
The SEC has been investigating crypto exchange Coinbase (COIN) over whether it misstated its user numbers in past securities filings and marketing materials. The probe began under the former presidential administration while the SEC was still under the control of then-Chair Gary Gensler, according to the NYT, which first reported the story, but has persisted under the SEC’s current, crypto-friendly leadership.The metric at the heart of the investigation is Coinbase’s claim to have over 100 million “verified users.” It stopped using the metric in both disclosure and marketing materials in 2021, the year it went public on the Nasdaq
source: https://www.coindesk.com/business/2025/05/15/sec-is-probing-coinbase-over-user-number-misstatement-concern

data.title: SEC investigates whether Coinbase inflated user numbers ahead of 2021 IPO: NYT
data.description:
In a 2023 securities filing, Coinbase said it would begin disclosing “monthly transacting users” rather than the “verified users” statistic.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/354534/sec-investigates-whether-coinbase-inflated-user-numbers-ahead-of-2021-ipo-nyt?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Telegram Crackdown Halts $27B Haowang Guarantee – Dark Markets Persist
data.description:
Elliptic has traced more than $27 billion in illicit USDT through Haowang Guarantee, a Telegram-based laundering hub linked to Cambodia’s Huione Group and North Korea’s Lazarus hackers. Although Telegram has blocked related accounts, over 30 comparable underground marketplaces remain operational.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/telegram-crackdown-halts-27b-haowang-dark-markets-persist/

data.title: Coinbase says customer data breach will cost it $400 million
data.description:
Coinbase said on Thursday that it expects to lose between $180 million and $400 million after a cyberattack exposed customer information and triggered a nearly 3% drop in its stock. The statement came just four days after the company got an email from a threat actor on May 11, claiming access to internal documents and […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/coinbase-data-breach-will-cost-400-million/

data.title: FTX to begin $5 billion in creditor payouts May 30 under bankruptcy plan
data.description:
Bankrupt crypto exchange FTX will disburse more than $5 billion to creditors beginning May 30 via distribution partners BitGo and Kraken.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/354521/ftx-to-begin-5-billion-in-creditor-payouts-may-30-under-bankruptcy-plan?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Crypto Exchange Coinbase Hit With $400,000,000 Cyber Attack Involving Employee Bribery
data.description:
Coinbase, the largest US-based crypto exchange by trading volume, is disclosing a $400 million hack that relied on bribing exchange employees. In a cybersecurity incident report to the U. S
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/15/top-us-based-crypto-exchange-coinbase-hit-with-400000000-cyber-attack-involving-employee-bribery/

data.title: Walmart Price Hikes Will Come Despite Lowered China Tariffs
data.description:
Catenaa, Thursday, May 15, 2025- Walmart said that price hikes will have to come despite lowered China tariffs, the retailer said on Thursday, as it won’t be able to absorb all the price pressures. “We will do our best to keep our prices as low as possible but given the magnitude of the tariffs, even […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/walmart-price-hikes-will-come-despite-lowered-china-tariffs

data.title: Michael Saylor has a 'dental' advice for investors
data.description:
Michael Saylor, the executive chairman of Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) took to X on Thursday with a new one-liner for Bitcoin believers. “Sell a tooth if you must, but keep the bitcoin. ” It’s the latest in a string of dramatic — and controversial — declarations from Saylor, who has become. . .
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/michael-saylor-has-a-dental-advice-for-investors
